metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_843
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Ultrastructural localization of NCX3 in the cerebral cortex and hippocampus. Preembedding immunoperoxidase and silver-enhanced immunogold procedures were used.
Figure 6b: in CA3 stratum radiatum, several dendritic profiles contain clumps of immunoreactivity associated to microtubules, mitochondria and to plasmalemma.
6c: immunogold labelling associated with the plasma membrane near the postsynaptic density in a dendrite.
6d,e: labelled dendritic spines.

Table 1 presents a quantification of the immunolabeling, and shows that the majority of NCX3 profiles the cerebral cortex and in hippocampus are in dendrites and spines.

Antibody: 'a rabbit polyclonal IgG antibody generously provided by Dr.
K.D. Philipson'. Figure 1 demonstrated antibody specificity in western blotting of hippocampus, heart and cortex homogenates in comparison with a recombinant protein produced in HEK cells. Strong WB signals with little cross-reactivity are a good indication for the antibody specificity.. Experimental description: 'Sprague-Dawley male adult albino rats (200-300 g) were used in these studies'
